)	z!Exception classes used by Pexpect
ExceptionPexpectz9Base class for all exceptions raised by this module.

6/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/pexpect/exceptions.pyr

strr
__str__
ExceptionPexpect.__str__c
This returns an abbreviated stack trace with lines that only concern
        the caller. In other words, the stack trace inside the Pexpect module
        is not included.

EOFzRRaised when EOF is read from a child.
    This usually means the child has exited.N
TIMEOUTz-Raised when a read time exceeds the timeout. Nr
